Resume

2025

CECOS University

  • Winner, Mapathon Competition: Demonstrated exceptional technical problem-solving and spatial data skills under pressure to secure 1st place overall.

Professional & Leadership Experience

Software Engineering Intern

2025 - Present

CIL, CECOS University, Peshawar

  • Collaborated closely with peers and mentors to develop, troubleshoot, and optimize technical solutions, improving overall system performance.
  • Conceptualized and executed a high-impact technical project that successfully secured 2nd position in the university-wide Project Fair.
  • Actively applied academic knowledge to real-world tasks, setting a high standard for technical execution and peer involvement within the lab.

Management Volunteer

2025 - 2026

Zindigi Prize, CECOS University, Peshawar

  • Played a key role in the planning, coordination, and execution of the Zindigi Prize entrepreneurial competition, managing logistics for a major campus event.
  • Collaborated effectively with organizing committees to allocate resources, guide participants, and ensure smooth daily operations under strict deadlines.
  • Developed strong interpersonal, public speaking, and problem-solving skills by proactively resolving on-site operational challenges.
